zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty於1218年出生在英國蘇格蘭斯特拉可萊德時，他的父親Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian18歲，母親Devergulla Olifard13歲。他與de Comyn結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1298年4月8日在英國米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年80歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty于1218年出生在英国苏格兰斯特拉可萊德时，他的父亲Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian18岁，母亲Devergulla Olifard13岁。他与de Comyn结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1298年4月8日在英国米德萊可堂爾 本 倫敦享年80岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Moray
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Limerick and Cork): variant of   Moore   4.
English (of Norman origin): from the Old French personal name Mory, a pet form of Amauri (see Amery ).
English: perhaps also a variant of   Moore   1–3.

variants.name: Morrey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Morey  .

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Moree
meanings: French (Morée): habitational name from a place so named in Loir-et-Cher.

variants.name: Morie
meanings: Altered form of Moree, itself perhaps an altered form of English or French Morey (compare 2 below) or of Irish Morrow .
English (London): variant of   Morey  . This surname is rare in Britain.
French: unexplained. This surname is rare in France.

nameMeanings.name: Andrew
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Greek name Andreas, a short form of any of various compound names derived from andr- ‘man, warrior’. In the New Testament this is the name of the first disciple to be called by Jesus. After the Resurrection, St Andrew preached in Asia Minor and Greece. He is traditionally believed to have been crucified at Patras in Achaia. He was one of the most popular saints of the Middle Ages and was adopted as the patron of Scotland, Russia, and Greece. It has long been among the most popular boys' names in the English-speaking world, especially in Scotland. Its popularity in England was further enhanced by its use as a British royal name for Prince Andrew ( b. 1960 ), the Duke of York.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty was born in 1218, in Strathclyde, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian, was 18 and his mother, Devergulla Olifard, was 13. He married de Comyn. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 8 April 1298, in Tower of London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 80.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty est né en 1218, à Strathclyde, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Devergulla Olifard, avait 13 ans. Il a épousé de Comyn. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 8 avril 1298, à Tower of London, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 80 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty 1218 in Strathclyde, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian 18 und seine Mutter Devergulla Olifard 13. Er hat de Comyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 8. April 1298 im Alter von 80 Jahren in Tower of London, Middlesex, England.

Lui sposato de Comyn. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 8 aprile 1298, nel Tower of London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 80 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Pettyが1218年にイギリススコットランドストラスクリドで生まれた時，父Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothianは18歳，母Devergulla Olifardは13歳であった。de Comynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1298年4月8日にイギリスミッドレセックストウエル オフ ロンドンで80歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty(이)가 1218년 영국 스코틀랜드 스트래스클리드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Devergulla Olifard(은)는 13세였다. 그는 de Comyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1298년 4월 8일 영국 미들레세스 타워 프 런던에서 80세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty nasceu em 1218, em Strathclyde, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Devergulla Olifard, tinha 13 anos. Ele casou-se com de Comyn. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 8 de abril de 1298, em Tower of London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 80 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Andrew de Moray Justiciar of Scotia, Lord of Petty родился в 1218 г. в местности стратклид, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Walter de Moray - Lord of Petty, Justiciar of Lothian было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Devergulla Olifard, 13. Он женился на женщине по имени de Comyn. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 8 апреля 1298 г. в местности тоуир оф лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 80 лет.
